name: Ladder Capital Corp
business: Ladder Capital is an investment grade-rated, internally-managed real estate investment trust that originates and invests in a diverse portfolio of commercial real estate and real estate-related assets, focusing on senior secured assets.

exposures.sentence: Ladder Capital is an investment grade-rated, internally-managed real estate investment trust that originates and invests in a diverse portfolio of commercial real estate and real estate-related assets, focusing on senior secured assets.
